title: Purpose Canvas
description: L0 Purpose — Sinek Golden Circle (why/how/what) + JTBD anchoring. The framework's entry-point canvas, written first by /interview. Permissive by design: only type-pins the established top-level keys; a fresh brief writes a minimal subset. Added 2026-06-12 (gap analysis: the L0 entry point had no schema).
